issues.changeNote: Uses the selected horizontal tag rail, including a real seven-theme density case.
Adds the complete categorized 24-theme catalog to the existing History filters.
Shows all curated puzzle themes in the real replay flow reached from History.
Named reusable runs use centered bordered cards on Home with Add Run and edit entry points.
Whole Run cards reorder in real time, and each Edit action opens name plus direct ELO editing.
New Run defaults to All themes, accepts direct 600-2200 Starting ELO, and saves without starting.
Uses the selected grouped layout for the server-curated 24-theme catalog.
Custom run names are required and unique with inline errors.
Built-in Run editing allows a unique name and direct 600-2200 ELO while retaining its format and identity.
Custom Run editing allows renaming and direct bounded ELO entry with inline validation.
Removal expands an inline warning directly below the selected Run and retains ELO and history.
An empty Home exposes both Add Run and retained-run restore paths.
Place the Arrow Duel prompt card above the board and replace its target icon with the side-to-move King.
Animate the blunder and place the rounded prompt card with the side-to-move board King above the board.
Carry the revised King prompt card and puzzle-entry hierarchy into Review.
Settings no longer owns ELO controls; each run editor owns its current ELO.
